title: Computational Pathology AI Lab
description: Production-oriented research platform for computational pathology, histopathology image analysis, cancer-detection research, explainable AI, uncertainty, whole-slide learning, and reproducible MLOps. Research and educational use only; not clinically validated.
notes: Concept DOI for all software versions: 10.5281/zenodo.21445854. Archived version 1.0.0 DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21445855. Companion book DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21444837. This software is not a medical device and has not been clinically validated.
